Eksperci wskazują, czy polski system będzie na tyle wydolny, żeby nieprzerwanie wypłacać emerytury Polakom.

Perspektywa obu ocen pozostaje stabilna, co oznacza, że JCR nie spodziewa się w najbliższym czasie zmian w ocenie wiarygodności kredytowej kraju.

articles.title: Kurs JPY/PLN 19 marca 2026 r.
articles.summary: Poznaj kurs japońskiego jena na dzień 19 marca 2026. Jen jest jedną z głównych walut rezerwowych świata, dlatego ma znaczenie dla światowej gospodarki. Jednak jego kurs interesuje także podróżujących do Japonii w celach turystycznych. Z tego powodu pokazujemy obecny kurs waluty, jak też zmiany kursu jena w perspektywie dziennej i tygodniowej.

articles.title: Kurs EUR/PLN 19 marca 2026 r.
articles.summary: Oto bieżący kurs waluty euro na dzień 19 marca 2026. Euro to obecnie najważniejsza waluta w Unii Europejskiej, a od kursu euro uzależniona jest cena wielu importowanych i eksportowanych towarów i produktów. Jak wyglądają jej aktualne notowania oraz ile wynosi wartość względem złotówki? Wczoraj kurs euro wynosił: 4,2738 zł.

articles.title: Kurs USD/PLN 19 marca 2026 r.
articles.summary: Przedstawiamy notowania bieżącego kursu USD z dnia 19 marca 2026. Wczorajsza wartość dolara to 3,7263 zł. Od tego, jaki jest kurs USD, zależy cena wielu importowanych towarów oraz usług, których transakcje rozliczane są w dolarach. By pokazać perspektywę, w tym artykule pokazujemy zmianę kursu USD w ujęciu tygodniowym i dziennym.

articles.title: Almost 1 in 3 Americans doesn’t know when — or even if — they can retire
articles.summary: Some want to work to keep busy. Others can’t afford to stop.

articles.title: Social media is eroding young people’s happiness. Low-income teens may be most at risk.
articles.summary: Heavy usage of certain types of social media may be contributing to a drop in youth well-being, according to Gallup’s new World Happiness Report.

articles.title: Art and classic car auctions top $600 million despite Iran war
articles.summary: Experts say the global turmoil may have even helped demand for rare collectibles, as the wealthy search for safe, long-term stores of value.

articles.title: A Paramount-Warner Bros. movie slate could rule the 2027 box office, but is it sustainable?
articles.summary: Paramount CEO David Ellison has said he wants to make 30 movies a year and has franchises like Godzilla-Kong, Superman and Sonic the Hedgehog to lean on.

articles.title: Nvidia adds Hyundai, BYD and other automakers to self-driving tech business
articles.summary: AVs are important to Nvidia as self-driving cars remain one of the primary areas where the company can show growth outside of artificial intelligence.

articles.title: NFL, Paramount discussing media deal that could mean CBS pays an extra $1 billion or more
articles.summary: The NFL is discussing getting rid of its 2029-30 opt-out clause in exchange for an increase on TV rights that could push CBS to pay more than $3 billion a year.

articles.title: Apollo's John Zito questions private equity's software valuations: 'All the marks are wrong'
articles.summary: While Wall Street figures have flagged risks in private credit, Apollo's Zito is among the first within private credit to candidly acknowledge weakness.

articles.title: Peloton is launching bikes and treadmills for gyms, accelerating commercial strategy
articles.summary: Peloton is launching commercial gym-ready Bikes and Treads, expanding into gyms globally as it seeks new growth beyond its at-home fitness business.

articles.title: Mortgage rates surge to highest since September, hitting spring housing market
articles.summary: Mortgage rates jumped to a seven-month high Friday as war in Iran pushed bond yields higher.

articles.title: Starbucks union sent the company a proposed contract. Here's what baristas want
articles.summary: Discussions between Starbucks and the union representing about 6% of its company-owned U.S. stores hit a wall last year.

articles.title: Inside JPMorgan Chase's push to become the startup world’s new Silicon Valley Bank
articles.summary: For JPMorgan Chase, winning the niche of startup banking from rivals is about more than just gaining deposits: It's a bet to future-proof the largest U.S. bank.

articles.title: Flights are already getting more expensive after a jet fuel spike. When should you book?
articles.summary: Some airlines are already raising fares after a historic surge in jet-fuel costs.

articles.title: How the Iran war could start to impact U.S. retail prices
articles.summary: The retail industry could soon be taking the next hit from the Iran war's disruption to the global supply chain.

articles.title: The biggest names missing from the list of America's top philanthropists
articles.summary: MacKenzie Scott and many of America's richest are absent from the latest Philanthropy 50 ranking.
